notes.en: Serious outbreaks are rare in Sri Lanka. Caterpillars bore into rice stems and hollow them out completely.

description.en: Caterpillars bore into rice stems. Young plants show 'dead hearts'; older plants show 'white heads' where panicles emerge empty. Affected stems are hollow and plants lodge easily. No resistant varieties available in Sri Lanka; cultural control via land preparation and weed management.

description.quote: Young plants display dead hearts; Older plants show white heads; Stem hollowing and lodging. The caterpillars bore into the rice stem and hollow out the stem completely.

favored_conditions.quote: Serious out breaks of YSB are very rare; resistant varieties are currently unavailable
